title: ARPA Record Envelope
description: Common envelope required of every ARPA record, per spec/draft-agent-registry-protocol-architecture.md §13.1. Record-family schemas compose this via allOf and add type-specific properties.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this record instance.

record_type.description: Discriminator identifying which record-family schema applies.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of the record-family JSON Schema, per spec §33.1. Independent of the specification document version.

issuer.description: Identifier of the entity that issued this record.

subject.description: The entity or entities this record is about. MAY be a string identifier or a structured object for multi-party subjects (e.g. Authority Envelope §18.2).

proof.description: Tamper-evidence for the record. MAY be an empty object only in non-normative illustrative examples; a conforming implementation MUST populate proof for any record it treats as authoritative (§13.2, §29).
